user.title: Connect to Evertz Quartz Router
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Evertz EQX/EQT router or MAGNUM controller.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the router. Check the IP address and port.

init.title: Evertz Quartz Debug & Connection Options
init.description: These settings can be changed at any time without restarting Home Assistant.

data.verbose_logging: Verbose TCP logging (log every TX/RX message)

data_description.verbose_logging: When enabled, every raw Quartz protocol message sent and received is written to the Home Assistant log at DEBUG level. Useful for troubleshooting routing issues.
data_description.reconnect_delay: How long to wait before attempting to reconnect after a connection drop.
data_description.connect_timeout: Maximum time allowed to establish the initial TCP connection.

route.name: Route Source to Destination
route.description: Routes a source to a destination on the Evertz router.

levels.name: Levels
levels.description: Optional level override (e.g. V, VA, VABC). Defaults to the configured levels.
